description: Summon a fountain of blood at the target location that heals you and allies standing within its aura.
name: Blood Altar

description: Summon a fountain of blood that heals allies. Allies can activate Blood Feast synergy to heal for a large amount based on their Max Health.
morph_bonus: Allies can activate synergy for burst heal based on Max Health
name: Sanguine Altar

description: Summon a fountain of blood with extended duration that heals allies. Allies can activate Blood Feast synergy.
morph_bonus: Increased duration to 40 seconds
name: Overflowing Altar

description: Shoot a mass of webbing at the target area, immobilizing enemies and dealing Physical Damage over time.
name: Trapping Webs

description: Shoot webbing that immobilizes enemies and deals Physical Damage. Allies can activate Spawn Broodlings synergy to summon spiders.
morph_bonus: Synergy summons spider broodlings to attack enemies
name: Shadow Silk

description: Shoot webbing that immobilizes enemies and deals increased Physical Damage over time. Allies can activate Arachnophobia synergy.
morph_bonus: Increased damage over time
name: Tangling Webs

description: Ignite the flames of hatred in an enemy's heart, dealing Magic Damage and taunting them to attack you for 15 seconds.
name: Inner Fire

description: Ignite flames of hatred dealing Magic Damage and taunting enemy. Allies can activate Radiate synergy to deal damage.
morph_bonus: Converts to Magicka cost, allies gain damage synergy
name: Inner Rage

description: Ignite flames of hatred dealing Magic Damage and taunting enemy. Generates Ultimate when hitting a taunted enemy.
morph_bonus: Generates Ultimate when attacking taunted target
name: Inner Beast

description: Surround yourself and nearby allies with a shield of bones that absorbs damage.
name: Bone Shield

description: Surround yourself and allies with bone shield. Allies can activate Bone Wall synergy to grant damage shield and Minor Vitality.
morph_bonus: Synergy grants damage shield and Minor Vitality
name: Bone Surge

description: Surround yourself and allies with spiked bone shield that returns damage to melee attackers. Allies can activate Bone Wall synergy.
morph_bonus: Returns Physical Damage to melee attackers
name: Spiked Bone Shield

description: Launch a globe of necrotic magic that travels slowly forward, dealing Magic Damage to enemies in its path.
name: Necrotic Orb

description: Launch a globe of magic dealing increased Magic Damage to enemies. Allies can activate Combustion synergy to detonate orb.
morph_bonus: Increased damage, synergy detonates for burst damage
name: Mystic Orb

description: Launch a healing orb that travels forward healing allies in its path. Allies can activate Healing Combustion synergy to restore resources.
morph_bonus: Converts to healing orb, synergy restores resources
name: Energy Orb

description: When you activate a synergy, you restore Stamina and Magicka. Rank 1: 2% of max. Rank 2: 4% of max.
effect_rank_1: Restore 2% of Max Stamina and Magicka on synergy activation
effect_rank_2: Restore 4% of Max Stamina and Magicka on synergy activation
name: Undaunted Command

description: Increases your Max Health, Magicka, and Stamina by 1/2% per type of armor equipped (Light, Medium, Heavy).
effect_rank_1: 1% Max Stats per armor type equipped
effect_rank_2: 2% Max Stats per armor type equipped
name: Undaunted Mettle

description: Activate to heal for a percentage of your Max Health. Available when standing near Blood Altar.
name: Blood Feast Synergy

description: Activate to spawn spider broodlings that attack nearby enemies.
name: Spawn Broodlings Synergy

description: Activate to deal Magic Damage to taunted enemy.
name: Radiate Synergy

description: Activate to gain a damage shield and Minor Vitality, increasing healing received.
name: Bone Wall Synergy

description: Activate to detonate the orb, dealing Magic Damage to nearby enemies.
name: Combustion Synergy

description: Activate to restore Magicka and Stamina based on your max resources.
name: Healing Combustion Synergy

description: Improved healing output from the blood fountain aura.
name: Blood Altar (Rank II)

description: Improved damage and reduced cost for the taunt ability.
name: Inner Fire (Rank II)

description: Improved damage output from the necrotic orb projectile.
name: Necrotic Orb (Rank II)

description: Improved damage and immobilize duration from the web attack.
name: Trapping Webs (Rank II)

description: Improved shield absorption amount for you and allies.
name: Bone Shield (Rank II)

description: Activate to fear enemies caught in the webs for a short duration.
name: Arachnophobia Synergy

description: The Undaunted are a guild of dungeon delvers who seek glory in group content. Gain experience by completing dungeons and pledges.
name: Undaunted Skill Line

description: Freeze time at the target location, stunning enemies caught in the field when the effect completes.
name: Time Stop

description: Freeze time stunning enemies. When effect ends, gain Major Expedition for each enemy stunned, increasing movement speed.
morph_bonus: Grants Major Expedition based on enemies stunned
name: Borrowed Time

description: Freeze time stunning enemies for longer duration and dealing Magic Damage when the stun takes effect.
morph_bonus: Increased stun duration and deals damage
name: Time Freeze

description: Charge your weapon with unstable magic, causing your next Light Attack to deal additional Magic Damage.
name: Imbue Weapon

description: Charge your weapon causing next Light Attack to deal additional Magic Damage and apply a random elemental status effect.
morph_bonus: Applies random elemental status effect (Burning, Chilled, Concussed)
name: Elemental Weapon

description: Charge your weapon causing next Light Attack to deal additional Physical Damage and apply Minor Breach, reducing armor.
morph_bonus: Converts to Stamina, applies Minor Breach
name: Crushing Weapon

description: Bend time to grant yourself Major Expedition, increasing movement speed, and Minor Force, increasing Critical Damage.
name: Accelerate

description: Grants Major Expedition and Minor Force. Also purges all snares and immobilizations and grants immunity to them.
morph_bonus: Purges and grants immunity to snares and immobilizations
name: Race Against Time

description: Grants Minor Force for extended duration. Does not grant Major Expedition but lasts significantly longer.
morph_bonus: Extended Minor Force duration (36 seconds), removes Major Expedition
name: Channeled Acceleration

description: Channel to heal an ally over time while you maintain the channel.
name: Mend Wounds

description: Channel healing to an ally. While channeling, you also gain Minor Resolve and Minor Ward, increasing resistances.
morph_bonus: Grants Minor Resolve and Minor Ward while channeling
name: Mend Spirit

description: Channel healing to an ally. The healing also affects you for a percentage of the amount.
morph_bonus: Also heals yourself for a portion of the healing done
name: Symbiosis

description: Rewind time to return to your position from 4 seconds ago, restoring your Health, Magicka, and Stamina to those values.
name: Undo

description: Rewind time to previous position and resources. Also grants Major Evasion for 6 seconds, reducing area damage.
morph_bonus: Grants Major Evasion, reducing area damage taken
name: Precognition

description: Toggle ability that passively grants Minor Protection. Activate to rewind time to previous position and resources.
morph_bonus: Converts to toggle, passively grants Minor Protection
name: Temporal Guard

description: Meditate to restore Health, Stamina, and Magicka over time while channeling.
name: Meditate

description: Meditate to restore Health, Stamina, and Magicka with increased resource regeneration rates.
morph_bonus: Increased resource regeneration while meditating
name: Deep Thoughts

description: Meditate to restore resources. Continues to heal you for a short time after you stop channeling.
morph_bonus: Healing persists briefly after channel ends
name: Introspection

description: See Psijic Portals throughout Tamriel that contain valuable items and grant Psijic Order experience.
effect_rank_1: Enables visibility of Psijic Portals in the world
name: Clairvoyance

description: Blocking a spell grants you a damage shield for 6 seconds. Rank 1: Small shield. Rank 2: Larger shield.
effect_rank_1: Small damage shield when blocking spells
effect_rank_2: Larger damage shield when blocking spells
name: Spell Orb

description: When you have a Psijic Order ability slotted on either bar, gain a damage shield when you fully charge a Heavy Attack.
effect_rank_1: Gain damage shield on fully charged Heavy Attack
effect_rank_2: Larger damage shield on fully charged Heavy Attack
name: Concentrated Barrier

description: Gain Minor Protection when you have a Psijic Order ability slotted on either bar, reducing damage taken.
effect_rank_1: Gain Minor Protection (reduces damage taken by 5%)
effect_rank_2: Gain Minor Protection (reduces damage taken by 5%) permanently with Psijic ability slotted
name: Deliberation

description: Detect Stealthed and Invisible enemies within a certain radius. Rank 1: 10 meters. Rank 2: 20 meters.
name: See the Unseen

description: Improved stun duration and reduced cost for the time manipulation ability.
name: Time Stop (Rank II)

description: Improved damage bonus and reduced cost for weapon imbue.
name: Imbue Weapon (Rank II)

description: Improved duration and reduced cost for the time bending buff.
name: Accelerate (Rank II)

description: Improved healing output and reduced cost for channeled heal.
name: Mend Wounds (Rank II)

description: Improved resource restoration and reduced cost for time rewind.
name: Undo (Rank II)

unlock_requirements: Complete Summerset Chapter, start Psijic Order quest
description: The Psijic Order are masters of time manipulation from Artaeum. Unlock by completing the Psijic Order questline in Summerset.
name: Psijic Order Skill Line

description: Time breaches scattered throughout Tamriel. Close them to earn Psijic Order experience and valuable rewards.
name: Psijic Portal
